body.title: ProprioceptionSource — tool facia always warm in TWM
body.result: ProprioceptionSource added to push_sources.py — 60s heartbeat keeps TOOL_REGISTRY_ROOT + INTERP_FACIA_* warm in TWM at salience 0.35. 555 tests pass.
body.description: New push source in push_sources.py: keeps TOOL_REGISTRY_ROOT + facia neighbor nodes warm in TWM on 60s heartbeat. Tools are body parts not a lookup table.
